privileged_info_summary: The task correctly uses real E. coli OmpF porin data from RCSB PDB (ID: 2OMF). The output constraints (/tmp/ompf_result.json, figure_path, report_path) perfectly match export_result.sh and verifier.py scripts. The biological structure has been explicitly verified: Lys16, Arg42, Arg82, Arg132, Asp113, and Glu117 are indeed present in the real 2OMF structure. A programmatic verification confirmed that the distance between the alpha-carbons (CA) of Arg82 and Asp113 on chain A is approximately 16.29 Å, which successfully aligns with the specified tolerance bounds of 7.0 to 18.0 Å.
